current.rationale: ambiguous MM:SS timecodes (49:30, 110:30) misreadable as 49min vs 1h49 for a 2h video → weaker traceability

candidate.rationale: precise HH:MM:SS timecodes (01:02:00, 01:16:56) unambiguous for a 2h video; tight claim binding

baseline.rationale: external sources but no in-video timecode binding

note: BLIND judge independently identified hh:mm:ss as the citation-quality differentiator on the long video
